weather.headline: Rain And Snow Showers
weather.detail: Rain and snow showers before noon, then a slight chance of thunderstorms and rain and snow showers. Cloudy. High near 40, with temperatures falling to around 37 in the afternoon. North northeast wind 8 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
